category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers entering the Argentine market (IRAM / S-safety mark / energy-efficiency labelling).

title.en: China-to-Argentina LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入阿根廷：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入阿根廷：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Argentina's mandatory electrical-safety certification with the S-safety mark (Resolucion 169/2018 et seq., via IRAM / recognized certifiers), IRAM/IEC-based safety and performance standards (IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471), mandatory energy-efficiency labelling, and ENACOM radio approval for smart products, versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification. Argentina runs on 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与阿根廷强制性电气安全认证（带 S 安全标志，依据 Resolucion 169/2018 及后续规定，通过 IRAM／认可认证机构）、基于 IRAM/IEC 的安全与性能标准（IEC 60598／62560／62471）、强制性能效标签，以及智能产品 ENACOM 无线电核准的差距对照，并与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。阿根廷电网为 220 V、50 Hz 单相。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與阿根廷強制性電氣安全認證（帶 S 安全標誌，依據 Resolucion 169/2018 及後續規定，通過 IRAM／認可認證機構）、基於 IRAM/IEC 的安全與性能標準（IEC 60598／62560／62471）、強制性能效標籤，以及智能產品 ENACOM 無線電核准的差距對照，並與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。阿根廷電網為 220 V、50 Hz 單相。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Argentine law, Secretaria de Comercio resolutions, IRAM standards, the S-safety mark certification scheme, energy-efficiency labelling requirements, and ENACOM radio approval obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement. An in-country importer of record with a CUIT is generally required.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行阿根廷法律、商务秘书处（Secretaria de Comercio）决议、IRAM 标准、S 安全标志认证方案、能效标签要求及 ENACOM 无线电核准义务。通常须有持 CUIT 的境内进口商作为进口记录方。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行阿根廷法律、商務秘書處（Secretaria de Comercio）決議、IRAM 標準、S 安全標誌認證方案、能效標籤要求及 ENACOM 無線電核准義務。通常須有持 CUIT 的境內進口商作為進口記錄方。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer entering the Argentine market must obtain mandatory electrical-safety certification with the S-safety mark (Resolucion 169/2018 et seq., administered by the Secretaria de Comercio) through IRAM or another recognized certifier, testing to IRAM standards that adopt IEC 60598 (luminaires), IEC 62560 (self-ballasted LED lamps), and IEC 62471 (photobiological safety); affix the mandatory energy-efficiency label for in-scope lighting; design for 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase (same 50 Hz as China, but China three-phase is 380 V); obtain ENACOM type approval (homologacion) for any smart luminaire with wireless functionality; and appoint an in-country importer of record holding a CUIT. Argentina has no horizontal RoHS-style restricted-substance regime equivalent to the EU — none of these Argentine obligations are covered by existing Chinese CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 进入阿根廷市场的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：取得带 S 安全标志的强制性电气安全认证（依据 Resolucion 169/2018 及后续规定，由商务秘书处管理），通过 IRAM 或其他认可认证机构进行，并按采用 IEC 60598（灯具）、IEC 62560（自镇流 LED 灯）及 IEC 62471（光生物安全）的 IRAM 标准检测；为适用照明产品贴附强制性能效标签；按 220 V、50 Hz 单相设计（与中国同为 50 Hz，但中国三相为 380 V）；对任何具备无线功能的智能灯具取得 ENACOM 型号核准（homologacion）；并指定持有 CUIT 的境内进口记录方。阿根廷没有相当于欧盟的横向 RoHS 式限用物质制度——上述阿根廷义务均不被现有中国 CCC 认证所涵盖。
answer_first.zht: 進入阿根廷市場的中國 LED 燈具制造商須：取得帶 S 安全標誌的強制性電氣安全認證（依據 Resolucion 169/2018 及後續規定，由商務秘書處管理），通過 IRAM 或其他認可認證機構進行，並按採用 IEC 60598（燈具）、IEC 62560（自鎮流 LED 燈）及 IEC 62471（光生物安全）的 IRAM 標準檢測；為適用照明產品貼附強制性能效標籤；按 220 V、50 Hz 單相設計（與中國同為 50 Hz，但中國三相為 380 V）；對任何具備無線功能的智能燈具取得 ENACOM 型號核准（homologacion）；並指定持有 CUIT 的境內進口記錄方。阿根廷沒有相當於歐盟的橫向 RoHS 式限用物質制度——上述阿根廷義務均不被現有中國 CCC 認證所涵蓋。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Argentine S-mark resolutions (Secretaria de Comercio), IRAM-adopted IEC editions, and energy-efficiency labelling scope must be re-verified against current official sources on each review cycle. Where Argentina lacks an EU-style horizontal regime (RoHS, REACH SVHC, battery regulation), the row must say so plainly rather than imply an equivalent obligation.
